description: Formal dataset source registry for bpc-hybrid project. All sources are PAPER_ONLY or NOT_ACQUIRED unless otherwise noted.

paper_artifact.title: Sun et al. 2024 — Design-time business process compliance assessment based on multi-granularity semantic information
paper_artifact.note: Paper PDF and derived full-text extract are retained locally for reconstruction reference but not committed to git due to unclear redistribution/copyright status of the published PDF.

sources.name: Sun et al. 2024 — Austrian Income Tax Code (modality classification)
sources.acquisition_path: Contact corresponding author (yudj@hdu.edu.cn) or locate reference [28]
sources.notes: Publicly available per paper. Sentences from Austrian Income Tax Code (Bundesgesetzblatt 1988/400).

sources.name: Sun et al. 2024 — 150 annotated sentences (semantic extraction)
sources.acquisition_path: Contact corresponding author — 'available on reasonable request'
sources.paper_evidence: Table 8 — 150 sentences, >20 words each, 6-concept phrase-level annotation, 10% double-annotated
sources.notes: Same source as DS001 (Austrian Income Tax Code). Annotations: type + span (character positions).

sources.name: Sun et al. 2024 — 12 BPMN process models (matching evaluation)
sources.paper_evidence: Table 9 — 12 process models, Austrian energy supplier smart meter scenarios, expert-validated
sources.notes: Built and validated by domain experts. One-to-many relationship to rule base parsed from regulatory documents.

sources.name: Sun et al. 2024 — 4 GDPR BPMN models (end-to-end checking)
sources.paper_evidence: Table 10/11 — 4 BPMN models (BPMN1-4), 21-46 matching rules each, GDPR Articles 1-50
sources.notes: Process models capturing GDPR privacy constraints. Overall MAP=0.840 at τ=0.8 (Table 11).

sources.name: Sun et al. 2024 — Pre-trained bert-legal-uncased model
sources.acquisition_path: Search HuggingFace for 'bert-legal-uncased' or contact author
sources.paper_evidence: Table 5/6 — Pre-trained on EU legislation documents, 12 layers, 768 hidden, 110M parameters

sources.name: GDPR Articles 1–50 (EUR-Lex)
sources.acquisition_path: EUR-Lex — publicly accessible, needs manual download + sentence splitting
sources.paper_evidence: Used as regulatory documents for GDPR BPMN compliance checking
sources.notes: Public domain (EU legislation). Needs conversion to sentence-level format with article/paragraph IDs.

acquisition_blocker: All Sun-specific datasets require author contact. See docs/r13_sun_reconstruction_plan.md for re-creation strategy.
